headline: Ulta (ULTA) Reports Q1 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say (Revised)
summary: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Ulta (ULTA) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended April 2026, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

headline: Ulta Beauty Launches New NielsenIQ Study on Gen Alpha and AI-Powered Beauty Discovery
summary: BOLINGBROOK, Ill., June 18, 2026--Ulta Beauty, Inc. (NASDAQ: ULTA) today unveiled findings from a new Ulta Beauty-commissioned study conducted by NielsenIQ, "Smart Beauty: AI, Personalization & the Gen Alpha Consumer," exploring how Gen Alpha consumers are navigating beauty and wellness in an increasingly AI-driven world. The study underscores Ulta Beauty’s commitment to understanding and evolving alongside the next generation, as well as building beauty and wellness experiences that are persona

headline: EXCLUSIVE: Kaia Gerber Joins Uni as First Creative Partner in Residence
summary: Gerber will collaborate across campaigns, partnerships and product development as Uni scales its Ulta Beauty footprint and broader business.
